{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032201532754E266BF74C7C79E99C6\"}"},"total":66},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7571279074002666264","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大文笔犀利，角色刻画极为立体，生动饱满，剧情以及构思都堪称一流，尤其互动环节，亮点频出，非常接地气，角色智商在线，看的很是过瘾，必须好评！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762828192,"group_id":"7550579928161324057","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0LNwyuH69xPH66CQVX/dlY=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0298773bb52d4dfd9c85aa442ae7ec36~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776705816\u0026x-signature=d6Aq2v4JrBLLgEdUx%2BrC4YL24F4%3D","user_id":"244521868724387","user_name":"素菜江流"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"244521868724387","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7550579928161324057","book_info":{"abstract":"丐版的同时穿越。即便都曾经是一个人，但是经历的不同也会改变。七个主世界暂定为明朝正德，美国影视剧，权力的游戏，综武，国内综合影视剧，综漫，以及火影。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/dc57eea00aa2e2c7c5d8455fd1498126~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"用户40941918","author_id":"","book_id":"7550579928161324057","book_name":"穿越，然后被一分为七","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#505050","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1016,\"name\":\"男频衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016\u0026name=男频衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":
